# Coreflood

**Summary**: A laboratory technique to simulate fluid flow through a core sample.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-abdallah|Abdallah, 2024]] performed coreflood experiments to measure permeability regain in treated fluids.
